---
title: "Charlotte Elizabeth Dyson"
---

## Charlotte Elizabeth Dyson

**Dates:** (Tidworth 1820/1-1886)

### Description

niece of Mary Anne Dyson, invalid

### Biography

CMY describes this person as daughter of the Rev. Francis Dyson, Rector of Tidworth.  He had two daughters, who were both resident in Malvern in 1851, 1861 and 1871.  It has been assumed that CMY refers to the elder, and not to his younger daughter Frances Letitia Dyson (1829/30-1903).

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]
- Letter from Sept 21 [1868[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
